# registry_terraform_mirrors (Data Source)

Lists all Terraform/OpenTofu binary mirror configurations.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "registry_terraform_mirrors" "all" {}

output "terraform_mirror_names" {
  value = [for m in data.registry_terraform_mirrors.all.terraform_mirrors : m.name]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `terraform_mirrors` (Attributes List) List of Terraform binary mirror configurations. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--terraform_mirrors))

<a id="nestedatt--terraform_mirrors"></a>
### Nested Schema for `terraform_mirrors`

Read-Only:

- `created_at` (String) Creation timestamp.
- `description` (String) Description.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether syncing is enabled.
- `gpg_verify` (Boolean) GPG verification enabled.
- `id` (String) UUID.
- `last_sync_at` (String) Last sync timestamp.
- `last_sync_status` (String) Last sync status.
- `name` (String) Mirror name.
- `stable_only` (Boolean) Only stable releases.
- `sync_interval_hours` (Number) Sync interval in hours.
- `tool` (String) Tool type.
- `updated_at` (String) Last update timestamp.
- `upstream_url` (String) Upstream URL.
